details.test: Task 1: Save longest post-2010 Nova Echo studio album to Favorites
Task 2: Create Short Solar Mix playlist with 5 sub-4-minute tracks from 2 Solar Lines albums
Task 3: Follow artist with more post-2015 albums between Midnight Parade and Crystal Harbor
Task 4: Bookmark highest-rated 2018–2022 electronic album with at least 8 tracks and rating >= 4.5
Task 5: Queue first two Harbor Lights live albums under 40 minutes
Task 6: Add Silver Atlas albums from 1990s, 2000s, and 2010s to Listen Later
Task 7: Open details for a Greatest Hits track of at least 7 minutes
Task 8: Create Duet Projects custom list with Luna Vale collaborations
Task 9: Add two 2020 indie rock EPs under 25 minutes to Library
